title: Rethinking Education Landscape & Artificial Intelligence

html: Rethinking education landscape and artificial intelligence at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organized by the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos state chapter.
